findings.result: Bibliographic entry confirmed; no article link or full text.
The volume record has no embedded article object, featured media, or attachment.
Empty media list. Exact-title searches of posts, pages, media, and the UM custom post type returned only volume record 909.
No matching registered work or DOI.
No matching work or open-access location.
Physical volume 41 is held by Umea University Library and Linkoping University Library; NTNU reports holdings from volume 1 onward.
Multiple physical holdings cover volume 41, including Osaka, the Institute of Statistical Mathematics, Tohoku, Hirosaki, and Hiroshima.
Serial identity confirmed; listed digital preservation begins in 2021 and does not cover volume 41.

scope_conclusion: No retrieved primary source states and proves that every 20-block C(11,5,3) cover is unique up to arbitrary point relabeling. The exact theorem hypotheses and equivalence notion remain unavailable.
campaign_consequence: The 20 matching classes and their residual CNFs remain a conditional exact reduction. They are not promoted to an exhaustive case set; no direct-20 CNF is solved in this tranche; the nine-orbit frontier remains active discovery scaffolding.
retrieval_plan: Request a scan of page 63 of Utilitas Mathematica 41 (1992) through a library holding the physical volume, citing ISSN 0315-3681 and the complete article metadata.
In parallel, request the legacy page from Combinatorial Press/current Utilitas Mathematica editorial contact, noting that the maintained archive lists the item but exposes no file.

On receipt, hash and preserve the scan, transcribe the complete one-page note, and audit whether it proves ordinary-cover uniqueness up to S_11 or only establishes the covering number/constructs one cover.
If the note does not contain a uniqueness proof, request the W. H. Mills private-communication material or independently certify the ordinary-link classification computationally.

route_switch.promote_direct_20: A primary proof is obtained whose hypotheses cover every ordinary 20-block C(11,5,3) cover and whose equivalence is arbitrary point relabeling, followed by an independent scope audit.
route_switch.retain_conditional_only: The Mills note proves only C(11,5,3)=20 or gives a construction without uniqueness.
route_switch.replace_literature_gate: An independent replayable exhaustive classification of ordinary 20-block C(11,5,3) covers is completed and audited.
